Call Us +1 (234) 567-8901
Email hello@email.com

Ethical. Loving. Trusted.

Raising Healthy Golden Retrievers — With Heart and Purpose!

Dedicated to nurturing gentle, loyal companions through ethical breeding, responsible care, and lifelong support.

About Us

What makes us different?

Our passion is clear: raising Golden Retrievers that are not only beautiful and intelligent but also deeply loved from day one. We are a small, ethical breeding program that prioritizes health, temperament, and responsible practices over quantity. Each puppy comes from health-tested parents and is given the best start in life—physically, emotionally, and socially.

All our breeding dogs are health-tested and vet-cleared
Raised in loving, family environments — no kennel breeding
Transparent pedigrees and lifetime breeder support
All our breeding dogs are health-tested and vet-cleared
Raised in loving, family environments — no kennel breeding
Transparent pedigrees and lifetime breeder support

Our Features

What do we excel in?

Health Guarantee

All our puppies come with a health guarantee to ensure they start life strong.

Learn more

Lifetime Support

We are here for you and your dog with our guidance and support - for life.

Learn more

Vet Partnerships

We work closely with trusted veterinarians to ensure best care from day one.

Learn more

Puppy Updates

Stay connected with regular updates as your puppy grows before coming home.

Learn more

Charlie
Golden Retriever

Charlie is a playful, curious pup who loves treats and chasing butterflies!

Portland, OR

Milo is a playful and loving pup with a knack for sneaking onto the couch.

Golden Retriever

San Diego, CA

Upcoming Litters
New golden pups coming soon!
The Willow Litter

Parents: Luna × Finn

Expected Date: June 15, 2025

This pairing brings together two gentle Golden Retrievers - known for their calm personalities and beautiful coats.

Join Waitlist
The Maple Litter

Parents: Caesar × Mini

Expected Date: July 2, 2025

These Golden Retriever pups will be loving, smart, and irresistibly sweet - perfect for allergy-sensitive homes.

Join Waitlist
Adoption Process
Your journey to puppy parenthood
01.
Application

Start by filling out our quick form so we can learn more about you and match you with the right puppy.

02.
Approval

We'll review your application and reach out for a short conversation to ensure our puppies go to loving homes.

03.
Waitlist

Once approved, you'll join the waitlist for upcoming litters. We'll keep you updated with litter announcements.

04.
Homecoming

When your puppy is ready, you'll be invited to meet them. After final checks, you'll bring home a happy companion!

Our Team
Introducing the faces behind us

Behind every happy, healthy puppy is a team of passionate individuals dedicated to care, compassion, and responsible breeding.

Rahul Mehta

Founder & CEO

Nguyen Minh

Canine Care Specialist

Neha Gupta

Veterinary Liaison

Jane Smith

Operations Manager

Testimonials
What people are saying about us?

"From the very first call to bringing our puppy home, the experience was seamless and full of care. It was clear these breeders truly love what they do. Our little Rosie came home healthy and happy—we truly couldn't be more grateful!"

Jane Smith

Austin, TX

"From the moment we reached out, we felt completely supported. Every question we had was answered with patience. Our puppy arrived healthy, playful, and clearly well-loved. We couldn't have asked for a sweeter addition to our family!"

Nguyen Minh

San Diego, CA

Find your perfect pup—ethically, responsibly, and with love.
